chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1351of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case 07-11-2023 Mr. Waqar Ali Phulpoto, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioner under instructions does not press instant petition which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
